RESOLUTION.DESC:
The Security Council,
Recalling the conflict that embroiled [region]The Crown Dependency of Hong Kong[/region] at the end of 2023, in which the fledgling community, a colony of [region]Empire of Great Britain[/region], was invaded and suppressed by hostile forces from beyond their borders prompting intervention from this council in the form of an injunction,
Saddened that following the conflict the community chose to withdraw from the region, and pursue their ambitions elsewhere leaving the region uninhabited and with no native community in need of protection,
Acknowledging that with no community present within its borders the region has become a wasteland that serves only as a target for the ill-intentioned opportunists that lurk beyond the region’s borders,
Affirming that the former community would like to secure the region and keep it safe against predation,
Recognizing that the injunction now serves only to prevent the once native community from securing and protecting their region,
Hereby repeals “Injunct The Crown Dependency of Hong Kong”
RESOLUTION.NAME: Repeal "Injunct The Crown Dependency of Hong Kong"
